2604.07405.title: Conservation Law Breaking at the Edge of Stability: A Spectral Theory of Non-Convex Neural Network Optimization
2604.07405.paper_summary: Why does gradient descent reliably find good solutions in non-convex neural network optimization, despite the landscape being NP-hard in the worst case? We show that gradient flow on L-layer ReLU networks without bias preserves L-1 conservation laws C_l = ||W_{l+1}||_F^2 - ||W_l||_F^2, confining trajectories to lower-dimensional manifolds. Under discrete gradient descent, these laws break with total drift scaling as eta^alpha where alpha is approximately 1.1-1.6 depending on architecture, loss function, and width. We decompose this drift exactly as eta^2 * S(eta), where the gradient imbalance sum S(eta) admits a closed-form spectral crossover formula with mode coefficients c_k proportional to e_k(0)^2 * lambda_{x,k}^2, derived from first principles and validated for both linear (R=0.85) and ReLU (R>0.80) networks. For cross-entropy loss, softmax probability concentration drives exponential Hessian spectral compression with timescale tau = Theta(1/eta) independent of training set size, explaining why cross-entropy self-regularizes the drift exponent near alpha=1.0. We identify two dynamical regimes separated by a width-dependent transition: a perturbative sub-Edge-of-Stability regime where the spectral formula applies, and a non-perturbative regime with extensive mode coupling. All predictions are validated across 23 experiments.
2604.07405.paper_summary_zh: 為什麼在非凸神經網絡優化中，儘管在最壞情況下景觀是 NP-hard，梯度下降仍然可靠地找到良好的解決方案？我們顯示，無偏差的 L 層 ReLU 網絡上的梯度流保持 L-1 守恆定律 C_l = ||W_{l+1}||_F^2 - ||W_l||_F^2，將軌跡限制在低維流形中。在離散梯度下降下，這些定律隨著總漂移破裂，漂移量的比例為 eta^alpha，其中 alpha 約為 1.1-1.6，具體取決於架構、損失函數和寬度。我們將這種漂移精確分解為 eta^2 * S(eta)，其中梯度不平衡總和 S(eta) 具有閉合形式的光譜交叉公式，模式係數 c_k 與 e_k(0)^2 * lambda_{x,k}^2 成正比，這是從第一原理推導而來並且在線性 (R=0.85) 和 ReLU (R>0.80) 網絡中得到了驗證。對於交叉熵損失，softmax 概率集中驅動指數海森光譜壓縮，時間尺度 tau = Theta(1/eta) 與訓練集大小無關，解釋了為什麼交叉熵自我正則化漂移指數接近 alpha=1.0。我們識別出兩個動力學範疇，這兩者由寬度依賴的轉變分開：一個擾動性亞穩定邊緣範疇，其中光譜公式適用，和一個具有廣泛模式耦合的非擾動性範疇。所有預測在 23 次實驗中得到了驗證。
2604.07405.author: Daniel Nobrega Medeiros et.al.
